title: phyllanthus calcicola
intro: Phyllanthus calcicola is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly found in limestone areas and known for its unique adaptation to thrive in these environments. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Phyllanthus calcicola is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney problems, and protecting against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
